title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Ben Luisi's team at the University of Cambridge uses structural biology combined with AI tools including AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to decode bacterial defense mechanisms against antibiotics. The approach compresses analysis that historically took years into minutes, enabling faster discovery of countermeasures to antimicrobial resistance.
